protocol_notes: User describes experience with research-grade peptide reconstitution using analytical scale (mg scale), BAC water, 0.22 micron wheel filter, and vacuum-sealed injection vial. States comfort with this process for personal use from lab experience. Recommends lower-end analytical balance ($150 Ohaus range) for accuracy below 50mg. Advises aliquoting into separate vials/eppendorf tubes and freezing to avoid repetitive freeze-thaw cycles. Notes this method has more failure points than individually lyophilized vials.
